name: stuck
description: STUCK — Secure Traffic Utility & Configuration Kit. Root orchestration scripts for the FastAPI backend and React/Vite frontend.

scripts.setup: npm ci && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --require-hashes -r requirements-dev.txt
scripts.deps:update: npm run deps:update:backend && npm run deps:update:frontend && npm test && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm run deps:audit
scripts.deps:update:backend: cd backend && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip-tools && .venv/bin/pip-compile --upgrade --resolver=backtracking --strip-extras --generate-hashes --allow-unsafe --output-file=requirements.txt requirements.in && .venv/bin/pip-compile --upgrade --resolver=backtracking --strip-extras --generate-hashes --allow-unsafe --output-file=requirements-dev.txt requirements-dev.in && .venv/bin/pip-sync requirements-dev.txt
scripts.deps:update:frontend: npm install --save-dev --save-exact concurrently@latest editorconfig-checker@latest prettier@latest && npm --prefix frontend install --save-exact @ibm/plex-mono@latest @ibm/plex-sans@latest react@latest react-dom@latest && npm --prefix frontend install --save-dev --save-exact @playwright/test@latest @types/node@latest @types/react@latest @types/react-dom@latest @vitejs/plugin-react@latest @vitest/ui@latest happy-dom@latest typescript@latest vite@latest vitest@latest
scripts.deps:audit: npm run deps:audit:backend && npm audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=high
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:prettier
scripts.format:check: npm run format:backend:check && npm run format:prettier:check && npm run lint:editorconfig
scripts.format:backend: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff format app tests tools
scripts.format:backend:check: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff format --check app tests tools
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.test: npm run version:check && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
